title: 続きを/voteで続けて。 • consensus mode の前提を確認します。まず Claude と GLM の live lane を起動できるかを確認し、同時に現在の auth- stale 導線設計を維持したまま continuation 可能かを見ます。 • Ran which glm └ glm not found • Explored └ Read agent-glm-general-reviewer.json, agent-claude-general-reviewer.json ────────────────────────────────────────────────...
summary_text: Consensus mode is active. Active models: Codex, GLM (`glm-5`). `BLOCKED`: Claude lane is unavailable, so Kernel quorum for adjudication/final recommendation is not satisfied. Bridge-authoritative attempts failed with concrete reasons: - subscription runner: `claude-sonnet-4-6:exit1` and `copilot-cli:missing-token` - harness API route: `401` with `x-api-key header is required` I still advanced Phase 1 implementation. [app.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js) now turns auth-stale into a primary status-strip CTA, persists `activeScreen` / `activeTaskFilter` / `activeTaskId`, and preserves task selection across re-sync so return-from-auth can reopen the same context. [happy-auth-reentry.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-auth-reentry.js) centralizes auth-state derivation, reauth route planning, and reason-specific Work empty states. [happy-runtime-config.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/config/happy-runtime-config.js), [index.html](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/index.html), and [styles.css](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/styles.css) add the auth-entry config surface and status-strip action slots. [test-auth-reentry.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-auth-reentry.js) locks the new auth-stale CTA, returnTo, and empty-state contracts. Verification passed: - `node --check apps/happy-web/src/app.js` - `node apps/happy-web/tests/test-auth-reentry.js` - `node apps/happy-web/tests/test-behavior-contract.js` - `bash apps/happy-web/tests/test-state-contract.sh` - `bash apps/happy-web/tests/test-view-contract.sh` - `bash apps/happy-web/tests/test-design-contract.sh` - `bash apps/happy-web/tests/test-pwa-shell.sh` Lane evidence: - Codex main: implementation + local verification - GLM reviewer: live harness success (`http_code=200`) - Claude reviewer: blocked by missing Copilot token / missing Anthropic auth header There were already other dirty `apps/happy-web` files in the worktree; I left those untouched.
